signals: REUTERS: Unidentified drones spotted hovering near three VLCC crude tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
BRENT CRUDE: Spot price jumped 4.2% in the last 4 hours to $94/barrel.
MARINE TRAFFIC (AIS): 14 tankers belonging to major operators have dropped anchor outside the Persian Gulf, refusing to transit.
US STATE DEPT: Issues Level 4 advisory for commercial maritime traffic in the Omani Gulf sector.
